cleavage agent: incubation with 2.5 µg of trypsin (Thermo Fisher Scientific)
collision energy: a normalized collision energy of 27% was used for fragmentation
enrichment method: affinity purification of S-tagged protein complexes
fragmentation method: MS/MS spectra were acquired using a top 15 method, in which the top 15 ions in the MS spectra were subjected to high-energy collisional dissociation
instrument: Thermo Scientific Q Exactive Orbitrap Mass spectrometer
labeling: quantitative triple stable isotope labeling with amino acids in cell culture (SILAC) strategy
